target_flow: Create and modify parametric 3D models in FreeCAD
critical_note: FreeCAD is Qt-based and exposes 191+ elements via UIA. All toolbar buttons, menus, and panels are directly invokable via /invoke. Use /deep-query to discover available tools. The 3D viewport is OpenGL-rendered but all controls around it are accessible.

navigation_plan.note: Discover all available buttons and controls
Click any button by name — all Part Design operations are directly invokable

known_issues: Welcome/New File page covers the 3D view on first launch — use Ctrl+N to create empty document
Some text elements invoke but don't trigger the action — use Ctrl+N or menu buttons instead
Create body may fail with bounding rect overflow — use first occurrence if multiple matches
Primitive parameters panel has editable fields for Length/Width/Height — these are Qt widgets accessible via UIA
3D viewport is OpenGL — no accessibility for 3D objects, but all controls/panels are fully accessible
achievement: Full parametric CAD control through direct UIA button invocation. 58 toolbar buttons and 191 total elements accessible. Created 3D primitives via invoke.
